programme.desc: The Black College Quiz series is designed to encourage an appreciation of African-American Heritage and feature college students from Historically Black Institutions; Morehouse College, Spelman College, Chicago State University.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.desc: With 22,000 events held each year, there's a dog sport for every dog -- and every owner. Watch AKC Events on ESPN.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Award-winning director Dan Klores looks back on how, in 1995, one player managed to rub an entire city the wrong way.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Countdown
programme.desc: WNBA news, analysis, highlights and interviews.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Basketball
programme.desc: The New York Liberty battle the Golden State Valkyries at Chase Center for a regular-season game. Golden State lead the season series 1-0 after a 87-70 victory behind 16 points from Gabby Williams and seven assists from Veronica Burton.

programme.title: Live 3rd Test Day 3: ENG v NZ
programme.desc: Day three of the third and final Test at Trent Bridge between England and New Zealand.

programme.title: Live Austrian F1 GP: Qualifying
programme.desc: The starting grid for Sunday's Austrian Grand Prix is set with Formula 1 qualifying as the drivers look to battle their way through to Q3 for a shot at pole position.

programme.title: Live 3rd Test Day 3: ENG v NZ
programme.desc: Day three of the third and final Test at Trent Bridge between England and New Zealand.

programme.title: Live ICC Women's T20 WC: ENG v NZ
programme.desc: At the Oval, hosts England take on New Zealand in their final group-stage game at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup.

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day three of the PGA Tour's Travelers Championship at TPC River Highlands. Last year, Keegan Bradley claimed a one-shot victory over Harris English and Tommy Fleetwood.

programme.title: Live Major League Cricket
programme.desc: MI New York take on the Los Angeles Knight Riders in a 20-over contest from Major League Cricket at the Oakland Coliseum.

programme.desc: Washington Freedom play Texas Super Kings in a 20-over contest from Major League Cricket at the Oakland Coliseum.

programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.desc: Join Sky Sports F1 on the grid ahead of the start of the race at the Austrian Grand Prix.

programme.title: Live Austrian F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out in Spielberg for the Austrian Grand Prix at the Red Bull Ring. Teammates Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri fought for last year's win, with Norris coming out on top.

programme.desc: Day four of the third and final Test at Trent Bridge between England and New Zealand.

programme.desc: The final day at the 2026 KPMG Women's PGA Championship, won previously by Minjee Lee. Hazeltine National Golf Club is the venue for the third women's Major of the year.

programme.title: Strokes of Genius
programme.desc: Considered one of tennis' greatest matches in history, the men's final at 2008 Wimbledon pitted No. 1 Roger Federer against his toughest challenger, Rafael Nadal.

programme.desc: A look ahead to high-profile matches and storylines from this year's Wimbledon Championships.

programme.title: Strokes of Genius
programme.desc: Considered one of tennis' greatest matches in history, the men's final at 2008 Wimbledon pitted No. 1 Roger Federer against his toughest challenger, Rafael Nadal.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The University of Miami's football program tries to recover from the devastation left by NCAA sanctions and scandals.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Southern Methodist University's football program was riding high in the early '80s -- only to receive the "death penalty" from the NCAA after numerous rules violations.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: An exploration of the class and power dynamics in college sports through the interconnected journeys of one-time dynamic running back Maurice Clarett and former elite head coach Jim Tressel.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The polarizing beliefs and on-field successes of former Colorado football coach Bill McCartney.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The fascinating backstory behind the famous/infamous 1988 "Catholics vs. Convicts" college football game between Notre Dame and the University of Miami. The slogan summarized the subtext of cultural and racial tensions brewing between the schools.

programme.title: All-Access: Tennessee Spring Football
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at Tennessee's spring football practice.

programme.title: All-Access: Oklahoma Spring Football
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the Sooners football program.

programme.title: All-Access: Florida Spring Football
programme.desc: Teams take the field for the first time, giving fans an early look at what their programs will look like in the fall.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of ex-NFL star Steve Spurrier, one of the most fascinating and competitive men in college football.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Ole Miss defensive back Chucky Mullins and Vanderbilt running back Brad Gaines are brought together by tragedy.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The rise, fall and maturation of former Oklahoma University All-American linebacker Brian Bosworth.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The 1983 NFL Draft was highlighted by a record six quarterbacks being taken in the first round, including John Elway and Dan Marino.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: This documentary film takes a close look at the creation of a legend -- two-sport athlete Vincent Edward "Bo" Jackson, the only person ever selected to play in the NFL Pro Bowl and the MLB All-Star Game.

programme.title: All-Access: Auburn Spring Football
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Auburn's Spring football workouts.

programme.title: All-Access: Arkansas Spring Football
programme.desc: Teams take the field for the first time, giving fans an early look at what their programs will look like in the fall.

programme.title: Athletes Unlimited Softball League
programme.desc: Coverage of softball action from the American professional league.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Exploring the enigma of former NFL great Randy Moss leads back to his hometown of Rand, West Virginia.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: In 1962, the University of Mississippi erupted in violence over integration while swelling with pride over an unbeaten football team.

programme.title: ESPN Films
programme.desc: Recalling the fateful decision made by Nebraska coach Tom Osbourne to go for two points and the win, instead of kicking the extra point and a tie, in the 1984 Orange Bowl game against Miami.

programme.title: All-Access: Arkansas Spring Football
programme.desc: Teams take the field for the first time, giving fans an early look at what their programs will look like in the fall.

programme.title: All-Access: Auburn Spring Football
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Auburn's Spring football workouts.

programme.title: All-Access: Florida Spring Football
programme.desc: Teams take the field for the first time, giving fans an early look at what their programs will look like in the fall.

programme.title: All-Access: Oklahoma Spring Football
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the Sooners football program.

programme.title: All-Access: Tennessee Spring Football
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at Tennessee's spring football practice.

programme.title: Portraits: Thomas Davis
programme.desc: A closer look at former University of Georgia and Carolina Panthers linebacker Thomas Davis.

programme.title: The Buddy Way
programme.desc: The historic life and career of Coach Eugene F. "Buddy" Teevens III, highlighting his championship successes as a multi-sport athlete, his pivotal role at the Manning Passing Academy, and the groundbreaking innovations he made on and off the field.

programme.title: Portraits: Steve Spurrier
programme.desc: The career, memories and current interests of the head ball coach, Steve Spurrier. One of Spurrier's former captains - All-SEC linebacker, 1996 National Champion, and artist - James Bates, interviews Spurrier at the coach's new restaurant.

programme.title: Portraits: Mack Brown
programme.desc: The current and winningest UNC football head coach, Mack Brown, breaks down some of the biggest moments in his life and coaching career.

programme.title: Portraits: Mike Leach
programme.desc: Mississippi State head coach and all-time soundbite machine, Mike Leach, talks everything from Bigfoot and aliens, to crypto, to Leach's patented Air Raid offense.

programme.title: Decade of Dominance
programme.desc: A commemorative look at the 10-year anniversary of the College Football Playoff that highlights the SEC's success across the last decade. During that time, the SEC earned 12 CFP appearances and six National Championships -- the most of any league.

programme.title: One for the Ages
programme.desc: A look back at the 2019-20 football season for the LSU Tigers, with both a behind-the-scenes and cinematic glimpse at the run by Heisman Trophy winner Joe Burrow, LSU head coach Ed Orgeron and the Bayou Bengals.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Exploring the athletic history of the Southeastern Conference, from the athletes and coaches to defining games and moments.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Herschel Walker overcomes bullying for being overweight and having a severe stutter to become a college football star and win the 1982 Heisman Trophy.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: A look back at the 1992 SEC Championship Game between Florida and Alabama.

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the third day of the First Test in the two-match series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The visitors won the last meeting against the West Indies in this format thanks to an impressive 164-run victory in Galle. programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golf Life

programme.title: Rare Silver Kennedy
programme.desc: Add 31 Silver Kennedy Half Dollars from 1992 to 2021 graded near perfect PF69 Ultra Cameo to your collection today! Each coin features the highest eye appeal for their date and grade, including a bonus first year of issue 1964 Kennedy in PF69.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: Rare Silver Kennedy
programme.desc: Add 31 Silver Kennedy Half Dollars from 1992 to 2021 graded near perfect PF69 Ultra Cameo to your collection today! Each coin features the highest eye appeal for their date and grade, including a bonus first year of issue 1964 Kennedy in PF69.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sits down with Coach Prime to discuss his recent diagnosis with bladder cancer, how his other health struggles led to that diagnosis and how his faith helps him manage his day-to-day responsibilities.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sat down with Denver Nuggets legend Dan Issel to discuss his basketball career, his involvement with horse racing and his evaluation of Nikola Jokić.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.desc: Four teams compete in Elimination Match 1 of the Challenge Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Port Huron, Mich.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: La'Tonya Blanding shares her inspiring journey into the world of fishing, reflecting on the experiences that shaped her love for the sport. She opens up about the people and moments that sparked her passion, revealing how fishing has become both a source of joy and a powerful outlet for personal growth and connection.

programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: Live International T20 Cricket
programme.desc: Ireland v India. Coverage of the second and final T20 in the series from Stormont Cricket Ground in Belfast. Coming into this series the visitors had won all eight of their matches in this format against Ireland, with the first game being played back in 2009. The last time they met before this set of matches was at the 2024 T20 World Cup, as India won a group match by eight wickets in New York.

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the two-match series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The hosts haven't won the first game in a series against Sri Lanka since an impressive 226-run win over them in a three-match contest back in June 2018. West Indies made scores of 414-8 declared and 223-7 declared in their two innings as they bowled their visit

programme.title: Live: The EE Disability FA Cup
programme.desc: Birmingham Futsal v Bolton Futsal. Coverage of the Partially Sighted Final, which takes place at St. George's Park National Football Centre.

programme.title: Live: The EE Disability FA Cup
programme.desc: Royal National College for the Blind v West Bromwich Albion Blind FC. Coverage of the Blind Final, which takes place at St. George's Park National Football Centre.

programme.desc: The pick of the goals from Aston Villa's campaign.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Boston Red Sox v New York Yankees (Start-time 6.10pm). Coverage of the American League match from Fenway Park. The Yankees have performed well at this venue against the Red Sox in the last two series, winning five of the last six meetings since September 2025. That includes a 3-0 series victory earlier on in the season when they won 4-0, 4-1 and 4-2 back in April.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Highlights
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: The Lee Family carries on a family tradition of quail hunting in South Georgia.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Wade Borne, Jared Brown and Mike Checkett hunt in remote areas.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: With frozen ponds and stale birds, the crew grinds through the final week of Canada goose season at home; armed with ice ripplers, scouting, and determination, they carve out success one frozen waterhole at a time.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson employ countdown tactics to pick off suspended basin crappies in fall's cold, clear water.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Outdoor sporting and recreational events for everyone.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Join Bill and his Little Big Man as they share a friendship on the water that goes beyond fishing!

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew starts things out by visiting Key Largo Fisheries, before heading out on the water and doing a Cook your catch.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Learn lures and tactics from champion angler Ott DeFoe as he fishes his way to a monster largemouth.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures: Fishing with Wesley
programme.desc: Professional Fishing Consultant Wesley White travels across North America and around the globe in search of Adventure Fishing Destinations for Steve's Outdoor Adventures clients.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is crank bait from is dock.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy Gomes is coast-to-coast on a mission to find the freshest sustainably harvested seafood around.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A king of a Kansas buck has his reign come to an abrupt end.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Sean Lundy and son, Cole, conclude their 2023 and 2024 deer seasons.

programme.title: Archery
programme.desc: The best 3-D archery pros in the country shoot it out for big bucks on the Archery Shooters Association (ASA) national tournament trail.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Mountain caribou and Yukon Moose.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy Gomes is coast-to-coast on a mission to find the freshest sustainably harvested seafood around.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather Douville reconnects with her Tlingit heritage through teachings from her father, Mike Douville; a recognition of the critical need to safeguard traditional food sources and maintain ecosystem balance.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott teams up with Texas native Jimmy Galindo to help eradicate some sometimes delicious, highly destructive critters.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Mountain caribou and Yukon Moose.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and chef Jesse Griffiths target redfish and sea trout with guide JT Van Zandt and flounder with Capt. David Dupnik and wind up with a feast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Jesse hunt nilgai, a large Indian antelope; the duo butchers a beast and dig into nose-to-tail dishes.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa travels the globe going head-to-head with various animals.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: The Professionals takes viewers behind the curtain into the life and career of Jim Shockey and team, the trials and tribulations of traveling to the world's most dangerous hunting destinations, the risks of political unrest in foreign lands, man-eating animals, deadly weather and more.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer looks into a case of a jet ski operator who was too close to shore as well as some illegal activity on an off-road vehicle.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Select fire handguns might have limited capacity and application but are still exhilarating to shoot. Join host, Joe Mantegna as he looks back at some of the most exciting and interesting full auto pistols in firearms history.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Who will win this round?

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Walleye Fishing at Grassy Narrows Lodge on Lake of the Woods in Canada with a group of Veterans and Mandatory Fun Outdoors.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: There's a love of the exploration of all things fishing, as the In-Fisherman staff takes you fishing for giant smallmouth buffalo; fishes big swimbaits for burly walleyes; and digs into our long-standing love affair with giant sportfish.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew starts things out by visiting Key Largo Fisheries, before heading out on the water and doing a Cook your catch.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Join Bill and his Little Big Man as they share a friendship on the water that goes beyond fishing!

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy Gomes is coast-to-coast on a mission to find the freshest sustainably harvested seafood around.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike Anderson and Captain Sebastian Velez get on a great Trout bite in their home waters.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: This week's episode features Let's Fish anchor Andrew Upshaw fishing for Crappie at Lay Lake, Alabama.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: There's a love of the exploration of all things fishing, as the In-Fisherman staff takes you fishing for giant smallmouth buffalo; fishes big swimbaits for burly walleyes; and digs into our long-standing love affair with giant sportfish.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Things get crazy fishing in hot summertime; Dustin catches lots of big bass, but also many chain pickerel.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland and Sean O'Connell work small tributaries from the river to the Gulf of Mexico for bass, trout and redfish in the Mississippi Delta.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa travels the globe going head-to-head with various animals.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Mountain caribou and Yukon Moose.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott teams up with Texas native Jimmy Galindo to help eradicate some sometimes delicious, highly destructive critters.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Kira and David experience the Everglades catching snook & triple tail along the way with Capt Don and Capt Shawn MacMullin out of Islamorada, Florida.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Walleye Fishing at Grassy Narrows Lodge on Lake of the Woods in Canada with a group of Veterans and Mandatory Fun Outdoors.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Combines the lives and dreams of Sparky, a retired professional firefighter and president of M2D Camo.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Wade Borne, Jared Brown and Mike Checkett hunt in remote areas.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Sean Lundy and son, Cole, conclude their 2023 and 2024 deer seasons.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week we have Leigh McNasty and Jeff Elliott looking for gators.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger targets and shoots an old mature buck in South Texas.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: With frozen ponds and stale birds, the crew grinds through the final week of Canada goose season at home; armed with ice ripplers, scouting, and determination, they carve out success one frozen waterhole at a time.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: The crew met Juan years ago, and now he invites them to hunt some of his ground in Illinois; let's just say it was worth the drive from Mississippi.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: Bill Jordan explains how the late season can be the perfect time to take a monster buck.

programme.title: Super High Roller Bowl
programme.desc: From Las Vegas to London, and everywhere in-between such as Russia, Bahamas, China, and Australia - the Super High Roller Bowl is one of the biggest events of the year. The Super High Roller Bowl has awarded over $125 million in prize money.

programme.desc: From MKM Stadium in Hull, England, United Kingdom.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From March 23, 1994.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From May 14, 1994.

programme.title: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From Ernest-Wallon Stadium in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, France.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From April 9, 1995.

programme.title: INSIDE: Ducati Lenovo Team
programme.desc: A weekly, behind the scenes look at the highs, lows and realities of racing in the Ducati Lenovo team!

programme.title: MotoGP Racing
programme.desc: From TT Circuit Assen in Drenthe, Netherlands.

programme.title: Sportsnet World Highlights
programme.desc: A look at the best stories from around the world of sports.

programme.title: Live: MotoGP Racing
programme.desc: From TT Circuit Assen in Drenthe, Netherlands.

programme.title: The World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Competitors from around the world take part in a variety of strength challenges.

programme.title: Live: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From DIY Kitchens Stadium in Wakefield, England, United Kingdom.

programme.title: NRL Rugby
programme.desc: From McDonald Jones Stadium in Newcastle, New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: UCI ProSeries Cycling
programme.desc: Coverage of the second tier men's elite road cycling tour.

programme.title: MotoGP Racing
programme.desc: From TT Circuit Assen in Drenthe, Netherlands.

programme.title: Women's State of Origin
programme.desc: From North Sydney Oval in North Sydney, New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From May 20, 1995.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From Jan. 17, 1996.

programme.title: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From DIY Kitchens Stadium in Wakefield, England, United Kingdom.

programme.title: Jokers Wild off the Hook
programme.desc: Sparky joins friends touring the 800-year-old Castle Kilkea in Ireland, learning its history and fly-fishing.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson employ countdown tactics to pick off suspended basin crappies in fall's cold, clear water.

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: The mayfly hatch is in full swing, and Jon shows how to keep catching smallmouths when the surface explodes with natural food. He breaks down timing, bait matching, and location for the best results. Wrapping up, he chases early-fall walleyes on calm, clear days - refining tactics for one of the year's most subtle bites.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shop's Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: In travels across the Nation, Wade Middleton often finds himself with a few hours at random places to go fishing, and when he has a chance to go, he just launches the boat to see what he can catch. And sometimes he catches fish, and sometimes he...

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: NFL Lineman Ben Cleveland is back, and we're catching fish in all phases of the spawn on Tennessee's Dale Hollow Lake.

programme.title: Ultimate Catch
programme.desc: Captain Eric and guest angler Captain Mike Pisano fish McCallum Bay for an exciting day of speck fishing.

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Lake Texoma shows off for the Texas Team Trail! Find out which anglers rise to the occasion and figure out how to adjust in order to take home this Texas-sized trophy and earn more points towards the Team of the Year presented by Progressive race!

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour held at Jim King Park in Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is crank bait from is dock.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland and Sean O'Connell work small tributaries from the river to the Gulf of Mexico for bass, trout and redfish in the Mississippi Delta.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: The shenanigans continue in part 2 with Bill, Roy & George fishing for blues on the MS. River in Vicksburg.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Join Bill and his Little Big Man as they share a friendship on the water that goes beyond fishing!

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: Capt. Brian Gwilliam and the Guys transition from backcountry to the Gulf of Mexico, where they find a goliath grouper hot spot; George and Lain hit the bridges of Marathon to get the scoop on bridge fishing.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Climb on board the Big Coast BV30 with Captain Tim Milne and friends, and enjoy some season 18 moments.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Salt Water Sportsman National Seminar Series
programme.desc: George Poveromo leads a discussion on how to catch more and larger mahi.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: Inshore fishing a Tropic Star, Panama plus a big surprise that could only happen in this amazing fishery.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew starts things out by visiting Key Largo Fisheries, before heading out on the water and doing a Cook your catch.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob heads down to Key West for some epic offshore bottom fishing with his long time friend RT.

programme.title: Fly Fisherman Presents the Shoals
programme.desc: Join the Fly Fisherman crew on a wild exploration chasing sharks and giant trevally on foot in the beautiful paradise of St. Brandon Atoll.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Four teams compete in Shreveport, LA for the Summit Cup Championship Trophy.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: There are thousands of lakes in central Florida, and bass in every one of them. But for Chris Lane, finding a giant can be like finding a needle in a haystack.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down massive Smallmouth Bass in this untouched river. Shallow waters could force Ott to wade up the river to land this monster.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Hidden gems all over the country hold untold Bass treasures and today's shows up in an incredible way.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Fletcher Shryock battles Spencer Shuffield in the first Semifinal.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Four teams compete in Shreveport, LA for the Summit Cup Championship Trophy.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: On the untouched waters of Africa Banks in the Seychelles, we discover the incredible food chain that the waters support. This is what all our oceans should look like and what all fishermen should have the chance of experiencing at least once in.

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: Unspoiled coastline is what causes an angler to travel far and wide, and if one follows the Eastern shoreline of South Africa, you'd find areas that would draw any game fisher to the water. Tommo and Wes cover a lot of ground to discover the real...

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The Majesty of the Mighty Zambezi River is on full display as we target the trophy Tiger and Bream species on offer at the Barotse Flood Plains.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: We explore the remote windswept region of Southern Angola hunting for Kob, Garrick and Shad. The crew is joined by a Professor of Marine Biology who shares what he has learned about coastal fish migratory patterns and chalking up some amazing...

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: This spectacular resort precisely exemplifies that. Although the luxury waterfront accommodation and wonderful cuisine is hard not to wax lyrical about, it is their conservation ethos supporting this marine sanctuary that is so impressive.

programme.title: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: DraftKings Casino Report
programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: Mets Fast Forward
programme.desc: From June 26, 2026.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.title: Mets Yearbook
programme.desc: Highlights of the New York Mets season.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Amazin' Finishes
programme.desc: A year-by-year look at the team's most exciting comebacks, big hits, clutch performances and walk-off homers - all on full display for Mets fans to relive.

programme.title: Canyon of Heroes
programme.desc: An original SNY documentary that looks into the unique history of New York City's ticker-tape parades as they celebrated along Broadway, focusing on the major championship celebrations in 1994 and 1986.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure stories in New York sports from 1970.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure sports stories from 1977 are recalled.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 1986.
